input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.11.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.11.2.1
            TITLE: all participating team members must wear safety glasses with side shields at any time when:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.11.2.1: All participating team members must wear safety glasses with side shields at any time when:
EV.11.2.1 All participating team members must wear safety glasses with side shields at any time when:  
a. Parts of the Tractive System are exposed while energized  
b. Work is performed on the Accumulators
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 108 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: All participating team members must wear safety glasses with side shields at any time when: a. Parts of the Tractive System are exposed while energized b. Work is performed on the Accumulators
